case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ESMERALDA TUIALUULUU

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TUIALUULUU, ESMERALDA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-24-2018

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100049521), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JUL-21-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TUIALUULUU, ESMERALDA
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT (1033) (TRANSACTION ID # 100076073) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUIALUULUU, ESMERALDA $2,559.83 PRINCIPAL, $240.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,800.33, SEE SCANNED DOC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100076073) AS TO DEFENDANT TUIALUULUU, ESMERALDA
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT CCP 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 100076073) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-13-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100076073), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JUL-21-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TUIALUULUU, ESMERALDA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
